$schema_note: Run inventory for the A/B benchmark's first committed run (fg-a10402, benchmark T2; design docs/plans/2026-07-18-ab-benchmark-design.md D2 -- human's 2026-07-18 binding answer: 8 pairs, 2 per class, min-viable first run). Each entry is one task.md brief, byte-identical for both arms by construction (D3 -- arm identity is a runner flag against this same file, never brief content). Consumed by T8 as the run inventory: for each entry, run_pair the task at brief_path against both arm adapters, using pinned_base from the fixture contract, then score against ground-truth/task-key.json's matching checklist.
run_scope: 8 tasks, 2 per class (min-viable first run per D2)
